channel.title: diskutil on My Blog - For Fun
channel.description: Recent content in diskutil on My Blog - For Fun

item.title: How to Extend Free Disk Space for Macos
item.description: Extend disk with diskutils Delete partition “Free Space” to extend disk to current macos partition. Fixed Error “The new size must be different than the existing size” #repair (internal, disk0 - in your case) diskutil repairdisk disk0 #resize (synthesized, disk1 - in your case with HS) diskutil apfs resizeContainer disk1 0 Reference Cannot resize APFS partition - “The new size must be different than the existing size”
